overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, likely from Cyberpunk 2077. The camera moves along a rain-slicked sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, crosses a busy intersection with futuristic vehicles, and continues through a neon-lit commercial walkway with graffiti-covered walls and digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway with graffiti-covered walls

events.description: futuristic vehicle passes by on the right side of the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, approaching an intersection

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in colorful spray paint and street art running along the left side of the walkway
massive concrete overpass with industrial metal supports creating a roof over the sidewalk
distant skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon accents against the night sky
tall modern street lamps illuminating the road and sidewalk
metal railings separating the pedestrian walkway from the multi-lane street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-slicked concrete walkway beneath a massive elevated highway. A graffiti-covered wall runs along the left while traffic barriers separate the path from a busy multi-lane street on the right. The camera moves forward toward a distant intersection, with futuristic skyscrapers visible in the background and vehicles periodically passing by on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and digital signage

events.description: exits the covered walkway and enters the open intersection area
traffic light changes from red to green, allowing vehicles to proceed
crossing the street at the crosswalk alongside other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: stepping onto the crosswalk and walking across the multi-lane intersection while navigating between other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car waiting at the traffic light before proceeding through the intersection
pedestrian in light-colored jacket walking across the crosswalk in the same direction

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the wet asphalt
tall pole with suspended traffic signals showing red and green lights
large illuminated screen displaying advertisements on a metal framework
modern glass and steel structures with glowing windows lining the intersection

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up into a wide urban intersection as the camera leaves the covered walkway. The crosswalk lines are clearly visible on the wet asphalt. A digital billboard stands on the right while futuristic buildings rise in the background. The camera crosses the street with a moderate crowd of pedestrians as traffic lights change and vehicles wait at the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial walkway beneath elevated highway with neon food vendors and advertisements

events.description: re-enters covered walkway area on the far side of the intersection
large muscular pedestrian passes very close to the camera, temporarily blocking the view
entering area with bright neon food signs and commercial lighting, transitioning from dark to vibrant illumination

agents.ego_description: continuing along the covered walkway, passing a large pedestrian and proceeding through a commercial area with neon storefronts

notable_agents.action: muscular man with tattoos wearing a white tank top and patterned pants walking toward and passing the camera

entered.detail: thick cylindrical columns supporting the overhead highway structure
traffic control box with illuminated walk signal displaying yellow pedestrian symbol
bright illuminated advertisement for 'BIG' food items with colorful burger imagery
staircase leading upward to the elevated highway level
small commercial kiosk with glowing displays and merchandise
illuminated gaming cabinets with colorful screens and controls

segments.scene_description: After crossing the intersection, the camera re-enters the covered walkway beneath the elevated highway. The area is initially dark with concrete support pillars lining the left side. Around the 28-second mark, a large muscular pedestrian passes very close to the camera. The environment transitions to a commercial section with bright neon food signs, vending machines, and a concrete staircase leading upward. The walkway continues under the highway with traffic visible on the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered concrete underpass through a bustling urban intersection and back into a neon-lit commercial corridor. It begins on a rain-slicked walkway beneath a massive elevated highway, moving past graffiti-covered walls and traffic barriers while futuristic skyscrapers loom in the distance. As the camera leaves the cover of the highway, the scene opens into a wide intersection where the camera crosses wet asphalt amidst a crowd of pedestrians and waiting futuristic vehicles. The perspective then re-enters the shadows of the highway's concrete support pillars, passing a muscular pedestrian before the environment shifts into a vibrant commercial zone. This final stretch unfolds with bright neon food signs and vending machines lining the path as the camera continues forward beneath the elevated road.
